title: Create: Survival
description: A Create styled Modpack with some extra challenges, perfect for Single-Player & Multiplayer.
body:
Create: Survival is a slighty difficult modpack focused on Create, It's addons, Farmers Delight, It's addons, and survival features such as Dynamic Seasons and Tempeture changes (Which will force you to plan how you continue with your jurney).

### What is Create?:
<iframe width="460" height="215" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tz5maMNgWqE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🔧 Create+
Using the top Create Addons along with the main Create mod. you can create any contraption that the create mods provide.

The selected Create Addons are added to help progression into the New Age of automation / contraptions.

Either create fully automated systems to make surviving easy or create engeneering marvels.

Including Create Structures allowing for a quicker start into the create gameplay.

## 🫕 Farmer's Delight+
Allways got that itch to make food?

With Farmer's Delight and its Addons, This modpack provides ways to keep your hunger up with a lot more cullenary dishes.

All Farmer's Delight addons including Farmer's delight not only adds new Dishes but also more crops for you to gather.

Including new tools to use for all your cooking/ combat needs.

<details>
<summary>All Included Farmer's Delight Addons</summary>

- [Chef's Delight - Farmer's Delight Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/chefs-delight)
- [Corn Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/corn-delight)
- [Cultural Delights](https://modrinth.com/mod/cultural-delights)
- [Dumplings Delight Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/dumplings-delight-reload)
- [End's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-delight)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Miner's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight)
- [Ocean's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight)

</details>



## Macaw's Decorations
